---
title: "Security"
subtitle: "Proactive cybersecurity and NIS2 compliance for modern organizations"
description: "Blue Team cybersecurity operations, NIS2 Directive compliance, CISO as a Service, threat hunting, and incident response. Protect your organization with chen.ist."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Apple-clean design — confidence through whitespace */
        .sec-hero {
          padding: 8rem 0 6rem;
          text-align: center;
          background: #fafafa;
        }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sec-hero { background: #1a1a1e; }
        .sec-hero h1 {
          font-size: 3.5rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          letter-spacing: -0.03em;
          line-height: 1.1;
          margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
          color: var(--bs-body-color);
        }
        .sec-hero h1 span { color: #81BD4A; }
        .sec-hero p {
          font-size: 1.3rem;
          color: #86868b;
          max-width: 620px;
          margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
          line-height: 1.5;
        }
        .sec-link {
          color: #81BD4A;
          font-size: 1.15rem;
          font-weight: 500;
          text-decoration: none;
        }
        .sec-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .sec-link::after { content: " ›"; }

        .sec-section { padding: 6rem 0; }
        .sec-section-alt { padding: 6rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sec-section-alt { background: #1d1d1f; }

        .sec-section h2 {
          font-size: 2.75rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          letter-spacing: -0.025em;
          text-align: center;
          margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
          line-height: 1.15;
        }
        .sec-section > .container > p.sec-sub {
          text-align: center;
          font-size: 1.15rem;
          color: #86868b;
          max-width: 580px;
          margin: 0 auto 4rem;
        }

        /* Feature tile — Apple style: no borders, subtle bg, generous padding */
        .sec-tile {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
          border-radius: 20px;
          background: #fff;
          height: 100%;
          transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sec-tile { background: #2a2a2e; }
        .sec-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
        .sec-tile i {
          font-size: 2.25rem;
          color: #81BD4A;
          display: block;
          margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
        }
        .sec-tile h3 {
          font-size: 1.2rem;
          font-weight: 600;
          margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        .sec-tile p {
          font-size: 0.95rem;
          color: #86868b;
          line-height: 1.55;
          margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        /* Feature row — image + text, Apple-style generous spacing */
        .sec-row {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 5rem;
        }
        .sec-row.reverse { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .sec-row-img { flex: 0 0 48%; }
        .sec-row-img img {
          width: 100%;
          border-radius: 20px;
        }
        .sec-row-text h2 {
          text-align: left;
          font-size: 2.5rem;
          margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        .sec-row-text p {
          font-size: 1.1rem;
          color: #86868b;
          line-height: 1.7;
        }
        .sec-row-text .sec-checks {
          display: flex;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
          gap: 1rem;
          margin-top: 1.5rem;
        }
        .sec-row-text .sec-checks span {
          font-size: 0.95rem;
          font-weight: 500;
          color: var(--bs-body-color);
        }
        .sec-row-text .sec-checks i {
          color: #81BD4A;
          margin-right: 0.35rem;
        }

        /* Stat row */
        .sec-stats {
          display: flex;
          justify-content: center;
          gap: 4rem;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
          padding: 2rem 0;
        }
        .sec-stat { text-align: center; }
        .sec-stat-num {
          font-size: 3rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          color: #81BD4A;
          line-height: 1;
        }
        .sec-stat-label {
          font-size: 0.85rem;
          color: #86868b;
          margin-top: 0.25rem;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        }

        /* Process — clean numbered list */
        .sec-process {
          counter-reset: step;
          max-width: 600px;
        }
        .sec-step {
          counter-increment: step;
          padding: 1.5rem 0;
          border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
          display: flex;
          gap: 1.5rem;
          align-items: flex-start;
        }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sec-step { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
        .sec-step:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .sec-step::before {
          content: counter(step);
          flex-shrink: 0;
          width: 40px;
          height: 40px;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
          background: #81BD4A;
          color: #fff;
          font-weight: 700;
          border-radius: 50%;
          font-size: 1rem;
        }
        .sec-step h4 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
        .sec-step p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 0; }

        /* NIS2 list — clean, no heavy styling */
        .sec-nis2-col h3 {
          font-size: 1.1rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 0.05em;
          color: #86868b;
          margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .sec-nis2-col ul {
          list-style: none;
          padding: 0;
          margin: 0;
        }
        .sec-nis2-col ul li {
          padding: 0.6rem 0;
          font-size: 1rem;
          border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
        }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sec-nis2-col ul li { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }

        /* CTA section */
        .sec-cta {
          padding: 7rem 0;
          text-align: center;
          background: #fafafa;
        }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .sec-cta { background: #1a1a1e; }
        .sec-cta h2 {
          font-size: 2.75rem;
          font-weight: 700;
          letter-spacing: -0.025em;
          margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        .sec-cta p {
          font-size: 1.15rem;
          color: #86868b;
          max-width: 520px;
          margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
        }
        .sec-btn {
          display: inline-block;
          padding: 0.9rem 2.5rem;
          background: #81BD4A;
          color: #fff;
          border-radius: 50px;
          font-weight: 600;
          font-size: 1.05rem;
          text-decoration: none;
          transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .sec-btn:hover {
          background: #6BA33A;
          color: #fff;
          text-decoration: none;
          transform: translateY(-1px);
        }
        .sec-objections {
          margin-top: 2rem;
          font-size: 0.9rem;
          color: #86868b;
        }
        .sec-objections i { color: #81BD4A; margin-right: 0.25rem; }

        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .sec-hero { padding: 5rem 0 4rem; }
          .sec-hero h1 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
          .sec-hero p { font-size: 1.1rem; }
          .sec-section h2, .sec-cta h2 { font-size: 2rem; }
          .sec-row, .sec-row.reverse { flex-direction: column; gap: 2.5rem; }
          .sec-row-img { flex: none; }
          .sec-row-text h2 { font-size: 1.75rem; text-align: center; }
          .sec-stats { gap: 2rem; }
          .sec-stat-num { font-size: 2.25rem; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<!-- ===== HERO ===== -->
<div class="sec-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Proactive <span>Security</span><br>for Modern Organizations</h1>
    <p>Blue Team cybersecurity operations and NIS2 compliance. Effortlessly monitor threats, respond to incidents, and maintain regulatory alignment.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="sec-btn">Get a Free Assessment</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== SERVICES GRID ===== -->
<div class="sec-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Everything you need to stay secure</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Four integrated services that protect every layer of your business.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="sec-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
          <h3>SOC Monitoring</h3>
          <p>24/7 real-time surveillance, threat detection, and expert triage of your entire security environment.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="sec-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
          <h3>Threat Hunting</h3>
          <p>Proactive identification of hidden threats that have evaded your automated detection systems.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="sec-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i>
          <h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3>
          <p>End-to-end assessments, gap analysis, and compliance roadmaps for the NIS2 Directive.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="sec-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i>
          <h3>CISO as a Service</h3>
          <p>Strategic cybersecurity leadership, board reporting, and policy development on demand.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== FEATURE: Blue Team ===== -->
<div class="sec-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-row">
      <div class="sec-row-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg" alt="Security Operations Center">
      </div>
      <div class="sec-row-text">
        <h2>Continuous Monitoring.<br>Rapid Response.</h2>
        <p>Our Security Operations Center operates around the clock. We detect threats in real time, investigate with expert analysis, and respond before damage spreads. Your environment is watched even when you're not.</p>
        <div class="sec-checks">
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 24/7 SOC</span>
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Open-source tooling</span>
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> EU-based team</span>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:2rem;">
          <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="sec-link">Talk to our team</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== FEATURE: NIS2 ===== -->
<div class="sec-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-row reverse">
      <div class="sec-row-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="NIS2 compliance dashboard">
      </div>
      <div class="sec-row-text">
        <h2>NIS2 Compliance.<br>From Gap to Green.</h2>
        <p>The NIS2 Directive is now enforceable. We guide you from initial scoping through full compliance — risk assessments, supply chain reviews, incident reporting procedures, and board-ready documentation.</p>
        <div class="sec-checks">
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 4-6 week programs</span>
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Board-ready reports</span>
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Ongoing alignment</span>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:2rem;">
          <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="sec-link">Check your NIS2 status</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== FEATURE: Incident Response ===== -->
<div class="sec-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-row">
      <div class="sec-row-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-racks.jpg" alt="Incident response infrastructure">
      </div>
      <div class="sec-row-text">
        <h2>When the Worst Happens.<br>You'll Be Ready.</h2>
        <p>We develop, test, and maintain your incident response capabilities. When a security incident occurs, your organization responds in minutes — not weeks. Every phase is documented and rehearsed.</p>
        <div class="sec-checks">
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> IR plan development</span>
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Tabletop exercises</span>
          <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> NIS2 24h reporting</span>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:2rem;">
          <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="sec-link">Build your IR plan</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== STATS ===== -->
<div class="sec-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-stats">
      <div class="sec-stat">
        <div class="sec-stat-num">197</div>
        <div class="sec-stat-label">Days to Detect (industry avg.)</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sec-stat">
        <div class="sec-stat-num">&lt;24h</div>
        <div class="sec-stat-label">Our Detection + Response</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sec-stat">
        <div class="sec-stat-num">EUR 10M</div>
        <div class="sec-stat-label">Max NIS2 Fine</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sec-stat">
        <div class="sec-stat-num">0</div>
        <div class="sec-stat-label">Cost of Your Assessment</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== PROCESS ===== -->
<div class="sec-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-lg-5">
        <h2 style="text-align:left; font-size: 2.5rem;">How we work</h2>
        <p style="color: #86868b; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.7;">A structured four-phase approach. No ambiguity, no surprises.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="col-lg-6 offset-lg-1">
        <div class="sec-process">
          <div class="sec-step">
            <div></div>
            <div>
              <h4>Discovery</h4>
              <p>Stakeholder interviews, documentation review, scoping analysis.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sec-step">
            <div></div>
            <div>
              <h4>Assessment</h4>
              <p>Technical controls evaluation, gap identification, risk review.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sec-step">
            <div></div>
            <div>
              <h4>Implementation</h4>
              <p>Gap remediation, policy development, security controls deployment.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sec-step">
            <div></div>
            <div>
              <h4>Monitoring</h4>
              <p>Continuous SOC, compliance reviews, threat hunting, optimization.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== NIS2 SECTORS ===== -->
<div class="sec-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Does NIS2 apply to you?</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub">Organizations with 50+ employees or EUR 10M+ revenue in these sectors are in scope.</p>
    <div class="row" style="max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">
      <div class="col-md-6 sec-nis2-col">
        <h3>Essential Entities</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Energy</li>
          <li>Transport</li>
          <li>Banking &amp; Financial Markets</li>
          <li>Healthcare</li>
          <li>Water &amp; Wastewater</li>
          <li>Digital Infrastructure</li>
          <li>Public Administration</li>
          <li>Space</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6 sec-nis2-col">
        <h3>Important Entities</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Postal &amp; Courier Services</li>
          <li>Waste Management</li>
          <li>Chemicals</li>
          <li>Food Production</li>
          <li>Manufacturing</li>
          <li>Digital Providers</li>
          <li>Research Organizations</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="text-center" style="margin-top: 3rem;">
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="sec-link">Not sure? Book a free scoping call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== CTA ===== -->
<div class="sec-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Get your free<br>security assessment</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No sales pitch. An honest evaluation of your risk posture, NIS2 gaps, and top 3 priorities for this quarter.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="sec-btn">Book Your Assessment</a>
    <div class="sec-objections">
      <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free, no obligation</span> &nbsp;&nbsp;
      <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 minutes or less</span> &nbsp;&nbsp;
      <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Written report within 5 days</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
